speaker: charlie
text: G'day everyone, it's Alex here with Jamie and welcome to your Tuesday April 21st ParkSyde Bright Side bulletin. While the rest of the world's focusing on doom and gloom, we're here to remind you that brilliant minds are solving problems faster than you can say 'single-use plastic'.

speaker: alice
text: That's right Alex, and speaking of plastic, wait till you hear what scientists have done with that stubborn polyethylene that's been clogging up our world for decades. Plus we've got an underdog rugby victory that's got the whole Pacific celebrating, and Sam's got our beautiful autumn weather outlook.

speaker: charlie
text: Absolutely brilliant stuff ahead. Let's dive in because today's proof that when humans put their minds to something, magic happens.
